title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at TNT India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at TNT India
jsonLd.description:
Join the TNT India family as a Fleet Manager in Navi Mumbai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About TNT India:
TNT India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TNT India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
